overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City's commercial district. The player crosses a busy intersection, walks past towering skyscrapers with massive digital billboards, enters a neon-lit pedestrian underpass, and ascends stairs to an upper-level walkway. The scene features a vibrant cyberpunk aesthetic with palm trees, neon signage, and futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city intersection with palm trees and glass towers

events.description: crossing the multi-lane street alongside other pedestrians
reaching the opposite sidewalk and continuing along the commercial street

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection and stepping onto the sidewalk, moving through the crosswalk with the crowd

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car driving along the street parallel to the crosswalk
pedestrian in dark clothing walking in the same direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall dark glass skyscraper with multiple balconies and reflective windows
tall commercial building with large red Kendachi corporate signage near the top
tall palm trees lining the edge of the sidewalk
red structural beams spanning across the street with suspended traffic lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a futuristic city intersection with towering glass skyscrapers and palm trees. The camera crosses the multi-lane street alongside pedestrians, passing under red structural traffic gantries. The Kendachi building looms in the distance as the camera reaches the opposite sidewalk and continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with massive digital billboards and storefronts

events.description: passing large curved digital billboard displaying animated anime-style advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wide sidewalk past storefronts, digital displays, and various pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with distinctive spiky blonde hair and white tank top walking ahead

entered.detail: massive curved digital screen displaying colorful animated advertisements and anime characters
yellow signage for All Foods market with red text

segments.scene_description: Walking along the commercial sidewalk, the camera passes towering digital billboards displaying vibrant advertisements on the left. The Kendachi building remains visible on the right while pedestrians walk ahead. The environment features futuristic storefronts and the All Foods market sign as the camera approaches a covered walkway entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian underpass with green neon ceiling lighting

events.description: entering the covered pedestrian walkway with distinctive green neon ceiling panels
beginning to ascend the concrete staircase at the end of the underpass

agents.ego_description: walking into the neon-lit underpass and approaching the staircase, transitioning from outdoor to indoor environment

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red pants ascending the stairs ahead of the camera

entered.detail: long rectangular light panels emitting bright green neon light along the underpass ceiling
wide concrete staircase with metal handrails leading up to street level

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered pedestrian underpass illuminated by distinctive green neon ceiling panels. The environment shifts from natural to artificial lighting as the camera walks through the polished corridor. At the end of the underpass, the camera begins ascending a wide concrete staircase with metal railings, following other pedestrians upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper-level pedestrian walkway overlooking the street

events.description: exiting the staircase onto the elevated pedestrian bridge with view of traffic below

agents.ego_description: climbing the stairs and emerging onto the upper walkway, then continuing forward with an elevated view of the street

entered.detail: upper-level pedestrian bridge with polished concrete flooring and glass safety railings
large Kendachi corporate signage visible in the distance from the elevated perspective

segments.scene_description: Ascending the final steps, the camera emerges onto an elevated pedestrian walkway with glass railings overlooking the street below. The perspective shifts to an upper-level view of the urban environment, with the Kendachi signage visible in the distance. The camera continues forward along the elevated path, observing the street traffic and pedestrians from above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bustling street-level intersection into the artificial glow of an underpass and finally up to an elevated urban vantage point. It begins by crossing a multi-lane street beneath red traffic gantries, moving past palm trees and towering glass skyscrapers toward the distant Kendachi building. As the camera reaches the sidewalk, the scene shifts along a commercial strip lined with vibrant digital billboards and futuristic storefronts, including an All Foods market. The environment then transitions from open daylight into a covered pedestrian underpass illuminated by green neon ceiling panels, before the camera begins ascending a wide concrete staircase. Finally, the perspective emerges onto an elevated walkway with glass railings, shifting to a high-angle view of the street traffic and the city skyline below.
